rag_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes, not implementations
Use visible identifiers and named constants for range bounds in assumptions and guarantees
generic_rules: Formulate guarantees as boolean expressions linking variables to valid ranges
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for defining boolean range checks in AGREE
Wrap annex blocks in `annex agree { ... };` syntax
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing subcomponent ports directly in type-level contracts
Do not mix incompatible types in boolean range expressions
